Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Hmm this is a detailed request about analyzing anomalies in an insurance claim process using temporal profiling The user has provided a clear database schema an example temporal profile with potential anomalies and specific tasks for me to address

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to focus on three main aspects identifying anomalies from the given temporal profile generating plausible hypotheses for each anomaly and proposing SQL queries to verify them The anomalies mentioned are around RP PN AC and EN so Ill structure my response around these key pairs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For hypotheses I should consider both technical and human factors like system glitches manual interventions or workflow bypasses

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The SQL queries need to be practical and directly tied to the anomalies using the available tables to filter by time deviations resources or claim types

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill avoid overcomplicating the queries and keep them aligned with PostgreSQL syntax The response should be straightforward linking each anomaly to its hypothesis and verification method without unnecessary elaboration
